---
id: set-wifi
title: "Set Wifi"
description: "This API is used to set wifi configuration. It currently supports IPv4 addressing with DHCP-based IP assignment only; static IP configuration and IPv6 support is not available in the current API version."
sidebar_label: "Set Wifi"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/gen-2-x-api-reference
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Set Wifi"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/set_wifi"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This API is used to set wifi configuration. It currently supports IPv4 addressing with DHCP-based IP assignment only; static IP configuration and IPv6 support is not available in the current API version.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"set_wifi","description":"Specifies the operation being performed, in this case, setting the wifi configuration."},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123","description":"A unique identifier for the request, allowing tracking and debugging of the operation."},"wifiConfig":{"title":"wifiConfig","x-stoplight":{"id":"9x3bxuxkt84ag"},"type":"object","properties":{"interfaceName":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the network interface for which the Wi-Fi configuration is being set."},"enableInterface":{"type":"boolean","description":"Specifies whether the network interface should be enabled or disabled."},"operation":{"type":"string","enum":["CREATE","MODIFY"],"example":"CREATE","description":"The operation to be performed on the Wi-Fi configuration. It can either create a new configuration or modify an existing one."},"accessPoint":{"type":"object","required":["connect","isPreferred","essid","enableSecurity"],"properties":{"connect":{"type":"boolean","description":"Indicates whether to connect to this profile. If true, disconnects the currently connected profile and connects to the specified one; if false, just saves the profile."},"isPreferred":{"type":"boolean","description":"Marks this profile as the preferred one to always connect to when available."},"autoConn":{"type":"boolean","description":"Reserved for backward compatibility. It will be removed in the future."},"essid":{"type":"string","example":"ZWireless","description":"The ESSID (network name) of the access point."},"enableSecurity":{"type":"boolean","description":"Indicates whether security is enabled for this access point."},"ipv4Configuration":{"type":"object","properties":{"ipAddress":{"type":"string","example":"192.168.1.81","format":"ipv4","description":"The IPv4 address to assign to the interface."},"subnetMask":{"type":"string","format":"ipv4","example":"255.255.255.0","description":"The IPv4 subnet mask."},"gateway":{"type":"string","example":"192.168.1.144","format":"ipv4","description":"The IPv4 gateway address."},"enableDhcp":{"type":"boolean","description":"Specifies whether DHCP is enabled for automatic IP address assignment."},"dnsServer":{"type":"string","example":"192.168.1.78","format":"ipv4","description":"The IPv4 address of the DNS server."},"domainName":{"type":"string","example":"example.test.com","description":"The domain name for the network."}}},"ipv6Configuration":{"type":"object","properties":{"ipAddress":{"type":"string","example":"2a02:1234:420a:100b::99","format":"ipv6","description":"The IPv6 address to assign to the interface."},"prefix":{"type":"integer","example":"65","description":"The IPv6 address prefix length."},"gateway":{"type":"string","example":"192.168.1.144","format":"ipv4","description":"The IPv6 gateway address."},"enableAuto":{"type":"boolean","description":"Specifies whether automatic IPv6 address assignment (e.g., SLAAC) is enabled."},"dnsServer":{"type":"string","example":"2001:4860:4860::9999","format":"ipv6","description":"The IPv6 address of the DNS server."},"domainName":{"type":"string","example":"example.com","description":"The domain name for the IPv6 network."}}},"security":{"type":"object","properties":{"securityType":{"type":"string","example":"WPA2personal","enum":["WPA2Personal","WPA3Personal","WPA2Enterprise","WPA3Enterprise","OWEPublic","Open"],"description":"The security type for the access point, specifying the authentication and encryption method."},"securityDetails":{"type":"object","properties":{"WPA2Personal":{"type":"object","properties":{"password":{"type":"string","example":"test@123","description":"The password for WPA2-Personal authentication."}},"required":["password"]},"WPA3Personal":{"type":"object","properties":{"password":{"type":"string","description":"The password for WPA3-Personal authentication."}},"required":["password"]},"WPA2Enterprise":{"type":"object","description":"WPA2-Enterprise security configuration with optional certificate parameters.","properties":{"authentication":{"type":"string","enum":["tls","ttls","peap"],"example":"peap","description":"Authentication protocol for WPA2-Enterprise."},"innerAuthentication":{"type":"string","enum":["none","tls","mschapv2"],"example":"tls","description":"Inner authentication method to be used within the outer authentication protocol."},"identity":{"type":"string","example":"test","description":"The identity (username) for WPA2-Enterprise authentication."},"anonymousIdentity":{"type":"string","example":"test","description":"The anonymous identity for WPA2-Enterprise authentication."},"password":{"type":"string","example":"test@123","description":"The password for WPA2-Enterprise authentication."},"passphrase":{"type":"string","example":"test@123","description":"The passphrase for WPA2-Enterprise."},"certificate":{"type":"array","example":"ap1wpa2e","items":{"type":"object","maxProperties":4,"properties":{"key":{"type":"string","enum":["ca_cert","client_key","client_cert","cert_key_password"],"example":"ca_cert","description":"The type of certificate to be used."},"value":{"type":"string","example":"wifi_ca_cert","description":"The name of the specific certificate."}}}},"protocol":{"type":"string","enum":["WPA2_Enterprise_CCMP"],"example":"WPA2_Enterprise_CCMP","description":"The encryption protocol for WPA2-Enterprise."}},"required":["authentication"]},"WPA3Enterprise":{"type":"object","description":"WPA3-Enterprise security configuration with optional certificate parameters.","properties":{"authentication":{"type":"string","enum":["tls","ttls","peap"],"example":"peap","description":"Authentication protocol for WPA3-Enterprise."},"innerAuthentication":{"type":"string","enum":["none","tls","mschapv2"],"example":"tls","description":"Inner authentication method to be used within the outer authentication protocol."},"identity":{"type":"string","example":"test","description":"The identity (username) for WPA3-Enterprise authentication."},"anonymousIdentity":{"type":"string","example":"test","description":"The anonymous identity for WPA3-Enterprise authentication."},"password":{"type":"string","example":"test@123","description":"The password for WPA3-Enterprise authentication."},"passphrase":{"type":"string","example":"test@123","description":"The passphrase for WPA3-Enterprise."},"certificate":{"type":"array","example":"ap1wpa2e","items":{"type":"object","maxProperties":4,"properties":{"key":{"type":"string","enum":["ca_cert","client_key","client_cert","cert_key_password"],"description":"The type of certificate to be used."},"value":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the specific certificate."}}}},"protocol":{"type":"string","enum":["WPA3_Enterprise_CCMP","WPA3_Enterprise_CCMP_256","WPA3_Enterprise_GCMP_128","WPA3_Enterprise_GCMP_256_SHA256","WPA3_Enterprise_GCMP_256_SUITEB_192"],"example":"WPA3_Enterprise_CCMP","description":"The encryption protocol for WPA3-Enterprise."}},"required":["authentication"]},"OWEPublic":{"type":"object","properties":{"authentication":{"type":"string","description":"Authentication protocol for OWE-Public."}},"required":["authentication"]}}}},"required":["securityType","securityDetails"]}}}},"required":["interfaceName","enableInterface","operation","accessPoint"]}},"required":["command","requestId"]},"examples":{"Create WPA2 personal":{"description":"Payload to create a new WiFi profile with WPA2 Personal security","value":{"command":"set_wifi","requestId":"abc123","wifiConfig":{"interfaceName":"wlan0","enableInterface":true,"operation":"CREATE","accessPoint":{"connect":false,"isPreferred":false,"autoConn":true,"essid":"TestAP1","enableSecurity":true,"security":{"securityType":"WPA2Personal","securityDetails":{"WPA2Personal":{"password":"test@123"}}}}}}},"Modify WPA2 personal":{"description":"Payload to modify an existing WiFi profile password","value":{"command":"set_wifi","requestId":"abc123","wifiConfig":{"interfaceName":"wlan0","enableInterface":true,"operation":"MODIFY","accessPoint":{"connect":false,"isPreferred":false,"autoConn":true,"essid":"TestAP1","enableSecurity":true,"security":{"securityType":"WPA2Personal","securityDetails":{"WPA2Personal":{"password":"test@12345678"}}}}}}},"Set preferred AP":{"description":"Payload to set an access point as preferred","value":{"command":"set_wifi","requestId":"abc123","wifiConfig":{"operation":"MODIFY","accessPoint":{"isPreferred":true,"essid":"TestAP1"}}}},"Create WPA2 enterprise":{"description":"Payload to create a WiFi profile with WPA2 Enterprise security and certificates","value":{"command":"set_wifi","requestId":"abc123","wifiConfig":{"interfaceName":"wlan0","enableInterface":true,"operation":"CREATE","accessPoint":{"connect":false,"isPreferred":false,"autoConn":true,"essid":"TestAP2","enableSecurity":true,"security":{"securityType":"WPA2Enterprise","securityDetails":{"WPA2Enterprise":{"authentication":"tls","innerAuthentication":"tls","identity":"test","anonymousIdentity":"test","password":"test@123","passphrase":"test@123","certificate":[{"key":"ca_cert","value":"gen_cert"},{"key":"client_key","value":"gen_cl_key"},{"key":"client_cert","value":"gen_cl_cert"}],"protocol":"WPA2_Enterprise_CCMP"}}}}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"set_wifi response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"set_wifi"},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123"},"apiVersion":{"type":"string","enum":["V1.0","V1.1"],"example":"V1.1"},"response":{"title":"response","x-stoplight":{"id":"1uzw0wye4si2y"},"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"integer","example":0,"description":"Response codes:\n\n| Code | Meaning |\n| --- | --- |\n| 0 | Success |\n| 1 | Command payload is accepted |\n| 2 | Invalid payload |\n| 3 | Not able to retrieve information |\n| 4 | Firmware update in progress |\n| 5 | Can't reboot device, inventory in progress |\n| 6 | Region is not configured |\n| 7 | Interface is not available |\n| 8 | Insufficient flash size |\n| 9 | File not found |\n| 10 | Configuration already exists |\n| 11 | Inventory in progress |\n| 12 | No Radio Operation in Progress |\n| 13 | Firmware update Failed |\n| 14 | Battery is low, Cannot update firmware |\n| 15 | WIFI Error - SSID not found |\n| 16 | WIFI Error - Cannot delete active SSID |\n| 17 | WIFI Error - SSID missed |\n| 18 | WIFI Error - SSID already exist |\n| 19 | WIFI Error - SSID count overflow |\n| 20 | Wifi is not supported |\n| 21 | Certificate not found |\n| 22 | Advanced configuration not set |\n| 23 | Invalid enum value |\n| 24 | Max 32 prefilters limit exceeded |\n| 25 | Max 3 publish topics exceeded |\n| 26 | Max 1 subscribe topic exceeded |\n| 27 | Invalid tenant ID length |\n| 28 | Tag match pattern length exceeded |\n| 29 | Url missing for HTTP source |\n| 30 | Certificate content missing for direct source |","minimum":0,"maximum":30},"description":{"type":"string","description":"response description in detail","example":"Success"}},"required":["code","description"]}},"required":["command","requestId","apiVersion"]},"examples":{"example1":{"value":{"command":"set_wifi","requestId":"abc123","apiVersion":"V1.1","response":{"code":0,"description":"Success"}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
